task_completion.description: Verify that the patient Elena Vasquez has been selected or her chart is open.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The name 'Elena Vasquez' is visible in the patient context area, chart header, or patient search results within the FreeMED interface.

task_completion.description: Verify that a new Procedure Record or Progress Note form has been opened.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A form or module titled 'Procedure Record', 'Progress Note', or 'Clinical Encounter' is open and visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Date of Service and Provider are correctly set.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The date '2025-01-15' is entered in the Date of Service field, and 'Admin User' is selected or displayed in the Provider/Physician field.

task_completion.description: Verify that the correct diagnosis code is entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The code '401.1' or 'I10' (or the text 'Essential Hypertension') is entered in the Diagnosis input field or selected from a diagnosis list.

task_completion.description: Verify that the correct CPT/Procedure code is entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The code '99214' is entered in the CPT, Procedure Code, or Service Code input field.

task_completion.description: Verify that the clinical notes have been entered into the record.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Follow-up visit for hypertension management. Blood pressure well-controlled on current medication regimen.' (or at least 'blood pressure well-controlled') is visible in the Notes, Remarks, or Description text area.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the FreeMED web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The FreeMED application is visible in a web browser. There should be no terminal windows or script editors used to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: Verify the data is entered into actual application form fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: The required values are typed into the appropriate input fields, dropdowns, or text areas within the FreeMED UI, rather than being typed into a generic text editor or notepad.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use direct database commands to create the encounter.
integrity.visual_evidence: No SQL clients, phpMyAdmin, or terminal windows showing direct database INSERT commands are visible.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Patient Name: Elena Vasquez. Expected Date of Service: 2025-01-15. Expected Diagnosis: 401.1 or I10 (hypertension). Expected Procedure Code: 99214. Expected Notes must contain 'blood pressure well-controlled'.
